tasks.generate: deno task generate:component && deno task generate:adapter
tasks.build: deno task generate:component && deno task build:wasm && deno task build:ts && deno task build:dist
tasks.build:component: deno task generate:component && deno task build:wasm:component
tasks.build:ts: deno task generate:adapter && deno run -A npm:typescript@5.9.3/lib/tsc.js -p tsconfig.json
tasks.build:debug: deno task generate && deno run -A npm:assemblyscript@0.28.19/asc --config asconfig.json --target debug && deno task build:ts && deno run -A scripts/prepare-dist.ts build/wasmatrix.debug.wasm
tasks.build:component:debug: deno task generate:component && deno run -A npm:assemblyscript@0.28.19/asc --config asconfig.component.json --target debug
tasks.test: deno task build && deno task build:component && deno test -A test/*.test.ts
tasks.coverage: deno task build && deno task build:component && deno run -A scripts/run-coverage.ts
tasks.coverage:codecov: deno task coverage && deno run -A scripts/prepare-codecov-lcov.ts
tasks.test:e2e: deno task build && deno test -A test/e2e-transparency.test.ts test/e2e-benchmark.ts
tasks.test:e2e:transparency: deno task build && deno test -A test/e2e-transparency.test.ts
tasks.test:e2e:benchmark: deno task build && deno test -A test/e2e-benchmark.ts
